title: Your Agent is Hitting its Ceiling — Who's Actually Fixing It
subtitle: You've lost sessions to compaction, watched agents redo work, and restarted after crashes with nothing to resume from. Claude Code's leaked source reveals why: brilliant simplicity designed for interactive work, hitting an architectural ceiling as agents go autonomous. Here's who's building what comes next.
author: Graham Rowe
meta_description: Claude Code's leaked source reveals the architectural ceiling of agentic AI: markdown memory, prompt orchestration, zero crash recovery. Brilliant for interactive work, breaking as agents go autonomous. We mapped who's building durable state, observability, and crash recovery for what comes next.
